arts.sum: Barcelona reportedly reject an opening offer from Juventus for in-demand centre-back Ronald Araujo.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford latest: Could Barcelona make a late attempt to sign unsettled Man United star?
arts.sum: Barcelona reportedly consider making a move for Manchester United forward Marcus Rashford before the winter transfer window closes.

arts.ttl: Ilkay Gundogan reveals shock with former Barcelona teammate
arts.sum: Ilkay Gundogan may have left Barcelona last summer to return to Manchester City, but he still keeps up with his former club on a regular basis. On Sunday, he will likely watch them in action in the Spanish Super Cup final against Real Madrid, and as per TRS (via Sport), he revealed that he watched […] The post Ilkay Gundogan reveals shock with former Barcelona teammate appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Barcelona: 4 key battles that could decide Supercopa de Espana final
arts.sum: As often proves to be the case, the Supercopa de Espana final will be contested between Clasico rivals Real Madrid and Barcelona. The fierce foes have competed the last two finals - winning one each - and Madrid are seeking to draw level with Barcelona on 14 triumphs in the competition with victory on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Barcelona possible starting line-up against Real Madrid in Spanish Super Cup final
arts.sum: With this new option at his disposal, Flick faces a crucial decision: Olmo’s inclusion in the lineup would mean dropping Gavi, who was instrumental in the semi-final victory, contributing a goal and an assist. As a result, all signs point to him - in the same way as Ancelotti is expected to do - sticking with the same starting eleven for the final against Real Madrid (Sunday January 12, 2:00 p.m. ET / 11:00 a.m. PT.).

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Barcelona – El Clásico Combined XI
arts.sum: Real Madrid meet Barcelona this evening in the 2025 Supercopa de España final. Spain’s superpowers will do battle in Saudi Arabia for the first silverware of the Spanish football season. Holders Real Madrid can equal Barcelona’s record of 14 Supercopa successes with a win, having beaten their eternal rivals in last season’s decider. Ahead of […] The post Real Madrid vs Barcelona – El Clásico Combined XI first appeared on The Football Faithful.

As Hansi Flick explained during the press conference earlier in the day, everyone is ready and prepared for a major challenge – to win the season's second El Clásico and return home with the trophy. Hansi Flick has his heart set on winning his first major trophy as FC Barcelona manager, but he knows that what stands between him and the Spanish Super Cup title is one of the most formidable opponents in world football.
